scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.security-scan:json: vibe-guard scan . --min-severity low --format json --output reports/vibe-guard-report.json && node scripts/vibe-guard-report.mjs reports/vibe-guard-report.json
scripts.security-scan:ci: vibe-guard scan . --fail-on medium --format json --output reports/vibe-guard-report.json && node scripts/vibe-guard-report.mjs reports/vibe-guard-report.json
